StructurePhase.Reference: Ellner M., J. Alloys Compd., v366 p222 (2004)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 1230109. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS: Zr,Pt. COMPOUND PREPARATION: arc-melted. ATMOSPHERE: argon.THERMALTREATMENT: annealed at 1273 K for 3 d in sealed evacuated silica tube, quenched. Article Title: Bond energy in palladium and platinum-rich alloys with the A4 transition metals. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. Wyckoff Sequence: h g d a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Gohle R., Schubert K., Z. Metallkd., v55 p503 (1964)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: A2X. LPF Collection Code: 452345. Polymorphism: Low temperature phase. Sample Preparation: Compound Preparation: arc-melted. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Sample annealed at 923 K for 46 h, water-quenched. Article Title: Zum Aufbau des Systems Platin-Silizium. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. Wyckoff Sequence: d a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
